summary: Flash a short glowing blue center line when a navigation pinch is confirmed across the screen midpoint.
scope: Trigger only from confirmed navigate output, never from raw midpoint proximity.
Draw an 88pt by 4pt vertical blue line at screen center, vertically aligned to the yellow pinch point.
Fade the layered glow within about 240ms and clear it on cancellation, pause, app switch, hand loss or HUD disable.
Keep all gesture thresholds, navigation output and pointer clicking unchanged.
validation: swift test passed 32 tests including one-shot cross-center navigation
Swift warnings-as-errors and Release builds passed
Strict codesign and installed 0.8.4 build 18 checks passed
notes: The camera calibration window intentionally does not show the center flash.
